reporter-output.line: ⏳ APPIUM IS CLEANING DEVICE AND INSTALLING FRESH APK...
✅ APPIUM SESSION ESTABLISHED - STABILITY MODE ENGAGED!
-> Executing Negative Test: Empty Mobile Number
-> Verified Toast Message: Please enter valid mobile number
-> Executing Negative Test: Invalid Mobile Number (12345)
-> Verified Toast Message: Please enter valid mobile number
-> Executing Positive Test: Valid Mobile Number
-> Waiting for transition to OTP screen...
-> Successfully arrived at OTP Verification Screen.
-> Change Number and Resend Code buttons are visible.
-> New User detected. Executing Registration Flow...
-> Successfully toggled Gender selection to Female.
-> ✅ Login Flow Complete! Logged in as: Krishnafas
-> Step 1: Checking User Profile Name in Header.
-> Profile Name verified in header: Krishnafas
-> Performance Header and SEBI Disclosure verified.
-> Performance data verified for Nifty Positional
-> Performance data verified for Midcap Positional
-> Performance data verified for MCX Positional
-> Locating Analytics Chip: Long term Goal
-> Clicked Analytics Chip: Long term Goal
-> Performance data verified for Long term Goal
-> Step 1: Checking Core Trade Category Cards.
-> Promotional Banners scrolled into view and verified.
-> Step 3: Testing Bottom Navigation Functional Clicks.
-> Dashboard Content & Navigation test completed successfully.
-> Step 1: Extracting dynamic product list from the app...
-> Dynamically found 4 products: [MCX Positional, Nifty Positional, Midcap Positional, Long term Goal Oriented]
-> -> Checking Home Tab for: MCX Positional
-> Could not click top tab: Home
-> Found Home Service Card for: MCX Positional
-> -> Checking Live Trades Tab for: MCX Positional
-> Could not click top tab: Live Trades
-> Could not locate or click product chip: MCX Positional
-> Live Trades UI is blank or unrecognizable.
-> Step 1: Navigating to Trades -> Home Tab.
-> Payment Flow Test Failed: Appium clicked the card, but Flutter ignored it 3 times.
-> Opening the first available product to check for Live Commentary...
-> First Blog Card Content loaded instantly.
-> Like/Comment buttons not found. The UI layout might have shifted.
-> Step 3: Verifying Create Post (+) Business Logic.
-> ✅ BUSINESS LOGIC VERIFIED: User has no active product/trial. 'Create Post' (+) button is correctly HIDDEN.
-> Blogs Screen & Business Logic verification completed perfectly.
-> Tools Screen Test Failed: Expected condition failed: waiting for presence of element located by: AppiumBy.accessibilityId: Retirement Plans (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
-> Step 2: Testing Personal Details Update logic.
-> Profile & Settings Flow Failed: Expected condition failed: waiting for presence of element located by: AppiumBy.accessibilityId: Update (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)

test-method.description: Test In-App Notification Routing and Signal State Distribution
